plugins.description: Standard cross-sectional long-only backtest protocol with T+1 execution, fees, limit filters, NAV curves, IC, drawdown, and diagnostic charts.

plugins.name: backtest-overfit
plugins.description: Detect backtest overfitting and selection bias from multiple testing. Use when a user has a backtest / factor result and asks whether the Sharpe is real, whether a strategy is overfit, or wants to validate results...

plugins.name: block-trade-radar
plugins.description: A-share block-trade radar that joins each block trade to the same-day close to compute discount/premium, reads institutional (机构专用) buy/sell direction, flags repeated discounted takeovers and same-branch wash-like prints, and ranks names by amount and premium/discount, for the whole market or a single name.

plugins.name: doc-to-alphas

plugins.name: factor-alpha191-alpha101
plugins.description: Compute Alpha101 and Alpha191 factor values based on JoinQuant formulas with full or selected factor runs.

plugins.name: factor-blend
plugins.description: Multi-factor signal-level blending: redundancy removal via correlation matrix and top-bucket overlap, three weighting schemes (equal/ICIR/score), daily cross-sectional z-score synthesis, and composite re-evaluation. Signal-level only — outputs composite_signal, not portfolio weights.

plugins.name: factor-debug
plugins.description: Factor debugging playbook for NaNs, signal validation failures, look-ahead bias, horizon mismatch, checksum drift, and correlation violations.

plugins.name: factor-decay
plugins.description: Factor decay analysis with multi-horizon Rank IC curves, exponential/power-law/bi-exponential fitting, bootstrap half-life CIs, turnover decay, and Q5-Q1 group-return decay. Recommends optimal rebalancing frequency. Integrated with Pandadata for 5-horizon forward returns.

plugins.name: factor-evaluate
plugins.description: Single-factor evaluation skill covering rank IC, Pearson IC, Sharpe, drawdown, monotonicity, turnover, and composite scoring.

plugins.name: factor-mine
plugins.description: Disciplined factor-mining workflow for hypothesis design, implementation, validation, iteration notes, acceptance, and rollback decisions.

plugins.name: factor-optimize
plugins.description: Optimize an existing stock or futures factor with period sweeps, ablations, refinements, and a final keep-or-replace decision.

plugins.name: factor-orthogonalize
plugins.description: Daily cross-sectional OLS orthogonalization against industry one-hot dummies, size (log dollar volume), style (beta, volatility), and legacy factor exposures. Outputs residual signal with exposure-zeroing diagnostics. Integrated with Pandadata for sector classification and style controls.

plugins.name: factor-pool-evolution
plugins.description: Run one round of factor-pool recommendation from an existing stock alpha set. Use when an agent needs to start from user-provided seed factors, prepare mutation and crossover prompt packs for the current model to reason...

plugins.name: factor-review
plugins.description: Factor-library review skill for experiment logs, acceptance rates, score dynamics, factor-family structure, correlations, and research recommendations.

plugins.name: fundamental-factor-analysis
plugins.description: Compute, validate, and analyze A-share fundamental factors. Covers value (EP/BP/SP/CP/FCFP/GP/A), quality (ROE/ROA/gross margin/accruals/leverage), growth (earnings growth/revenue growth/analyst revision) and composite factors. Uses Pandadata financial APIs with IC analysis, grouped returns, and Fama-MacBeth regression for validation.
